Respiratory_rate_category.description: Respiratory rate categories in breaths/min, used to define cut-off points (30, 40, 50, 60) for constructing 2×2 tables.

LRI_count.description: Number of children with lower respiratory tract infection (LRI) in each respiratory rate category. Used to compute sensitivity at each cut-off.

URI_count.description: Number of children with upper respiratory tract infection (URI) in each respiratory rate category. Used to compute specificity at each cut-off.
